title: Quote of the day by Julius Caesar: 'The greatest power is not in defeating an enemy, but in...'
summary_full: Julius Caesar employed a strategy of mercy and generosity to convert adversaries into allies, effectively disarming their resolve by understanding their motivations. Similarly, the ancient strategist Sun Tzu emphasized overcoming enemies without physical confrontation. This principle informs contemporary diplomacy and business negotiations, where fostering ongoing peace and collaboration arises from tackling the root causes of discord.
